{{Expand}}

{{Infobox technique
| name = Archmage of ice elementalism
| introduced = lh-03-the-knight
}}

== The Knight ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|[[Laraena]] is an [[Archmage of ice elementalism]].<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c2">''The Knight'', chapter 2</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|There exists a concept of an [[Archmage of ice elementalism]].<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c9">''The Knight'', chapter 9</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{The Last Horizon nav}}

[[Category:Techniques]]
[[Category:The Knight]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
